rationale: The cited paper could plausibly be used as a mechanism/background source because it provides evidence that guilt/justification processes affect hedonic choices, and the citing paper also measures self-evaluative feelings and consumption guilt. However, the available evidence is only a single DOI match with no in-text citation context, and the two papers are in different substantive domains (bundle price framing vs. physical involvement in food serving), so substantive use cannot be confirmed.
